html:
THE VENDETTA GAZETTE

Special Edition • March 29, 2026 • "All the Blood That's Fit to Print"

THE IRON TITANS REACH FEVER PITCH AS FIFTH BLOOD EMPEROR CRASHES AND BURNS

Hold onto your fedoras, dear readers, for this week's carnage has reached positively operatic proportions! Our twin terrors of territorial conquest, Wu-Tang "The Iron Fist of the East Side" and the eternally dapper Sir Caprice, have outdone even their own magnificent records of mayhem, claiming a combined 221 turfs in seven days of sustained savagery!

Wu-Tang, that Oriental overlord of organized chaos, seized a jaw-dropping 112 territories this week – his highest weekly haul yet! – while conducting an absolutely biblical 102 separate raids across the blood-soaked boroughs. His three-week territorial tally now stands at a mind-numbing 319 turfs, proving that mathematical precision and murderous intent make perfect bedfellows.

Not to be outdone by his immaculately groomed rival, Sir Caprice claimed 109 fresh territories with his trademark surgical strikes, bringing his own three-week empire to a staggering 312 turfs. The gap between these titans of terror narrows to a mere seven territories – a razor's edge that promises explosive confrontations in the weeks ahead!

But the week's most spectacular collapse belongs to the once-mighty FIFTH BLOOD EMPEROR, who watched his crimson kingdom crumble as he hemorrhaged 32 precious turfs and suffered 33 separate raids! This imperial implosion marks the most dramatic fall from grace since Black Tuesday, with sources whispering that the Emperor's blood-red coffers have run dangerously dry.

SPECIAL BULLETIN: HEADQUARTERS HOLOCAUST REACHES BIBLICAL PROPORTIONS!

The most spine-tingling spectacle of systematic destruction unfolded as Wu-Tang's iron-fisted army delivered the coup de grâce to poor fadly28, storming his headquarters TWICE IN ONE DAY on March 22nd! But the Oriental mastermind wasn't satisfied with mere double-destruction – his educational program also claimed the scalps of Aharhibaba, 2345p, and Muna! Meanwhile, Sir Caprice's immaculate enforcers added Reti, Joshie, ayan, and the unfortunate 0xweb3 (also twice in one day!) to their ever-growing trophy collection!

VACATION BROTHERS SHOW RESILIENCE AMID FRESH BLOOD SPILLING

Those sun-kissed sultans of sin, the Vacation Brothers, continue their steady climb up Vendetta City's blood-soaked ladder! Vacation Steve claimed 39 turfs this week while conducting 45 precision raids, proving that paradise and plunder make perfect partners. His tropical twin Vacation Albert matched him stride for stride with 21 territories and 33 strategic strikes.

Meanwhile, Donald Trump – that golden-haired gladiator of graft – boosted his political portfolio with 25 fresh turfs, while the ever-reliable Blood Captain proved once again why crimson runs through his veins, executing a mind-boggling 99 raids while claiming 21 territories for his scarlet standard.

Fresh faces have emerged from the shadows this week, including the cinematically named John James Rambo (complete with blood emoji!), the space-age Flash Gordon, and the enigmatic OlegX7 – though each controls merely a single turf in this game of titans.

THE VANISHING ACT OF THE DEFEATED

This week witnessed the most dramatic exodus in recent memory, with 39 fallen figures disappearing into the night, their dreams of criminal empire reduced to mere whispers in speakeasy smoke. Among the casualties: the headquarters victims Reti, 2345p, Jeeva1661, and others who learned too late that crossing the Iron Titans carries a terminal price.

Notable casualties include StreetKing (-23 turfs), snakeeyes (-21 turfs), and a quintet of unfortunate souls who each lost exactly 21 territories: Ustaz Ice, Way6444, and vortex – proving that sometimes the house of crime deals everyone the same losing hand.

POLICE BLOTTER

• Officers report that Vacation Bob was spotted raiding his own associate Vacation Steve for $500 and a tommy gun – sources suggest it was merely a "family disagreement" over suntan lotion territories.

• Local authorities remain baffled by the case of 0xweb3, whose headquarters was raided twice in one day by the same gentleman – "We ain't sure if it's dedication or just poor memory," commented Chief O'Malley.

• The mysterious Flash Gordon was reportedly seen claiming his first turf while shouting "Gordon's alive!" – witnesses remain unconvinced of his mental stability.
